overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark grassy landscape at night, holding a wooden bat. The player moves from a cliffside path through open fields toward distant abandoned structures, illuminated by a flashlight in a survival-horror style game environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy path beside a rocky cliff face in darkness, illuminated by a flashlight

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall running along the left side of the path
tall grass covering the ground surface
dark night sky with visible stars above the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a narrow grassy path with a rocky cliff face on the left. The terrain is uneven and covered in tall grass, illuminated by a flashlight in the dark night. The sky is clear with stars visible above.

events.description: player character raises a wooden bat into view on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland while holding a wooden bat, moving away from the cliff edge

entered.detail: wooden club or bat held in the player's left hand
expansive open grassland stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The player moves into open grassland away from the cliff, with the wooden bat now visible in the left hand. The terrain becomes more open and flat, with tall grass continuing underfoot. The night sky is fully visible overhead as the character progresses through the field.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to a dirt path
abandoned vehicles or structures become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path toward abandoned structures visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with scattered stones becoming the primary ground surface
dark silhouettes of abandoned vehicles or structures visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions to a dirt path as the player approaches distant abandoned vehicles or structures. The wooden bat remains visible on the left while the character walks steadily forward. The environment becomes more desolate with sparse vegetation and scattered debris along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined cliffside path into a desolate, open wasteland under a starry night sky. It begins by navigating a narrow, uneven trail of tall grass pressed against a rocky cliff face, illuminated by the focused beam of a flashlight. As the camera moves away from the rock wall, the terrain expands into wide, flat grasslands where a wooden bat becomes visible in the character's left hand. The scene then shifts from the lush grass to a barren dirt path, with the environment growing increasingly desolate as sparse vegetation gives way to scattered debris. Finally, the camera advances steadily forward toward the silhouettes of abandoned vehicles and structures looming in the distance.
